# FastLease

> 21-day Toronto condo leasing operated by Property.ca Inc. Brokerage. If a qualified tenant isn't signed by day 21, the brokerage fee drops 21% — automatically, in writing.

FastLease.ca is the leasing arm of Property.ca Inc. Brokerage, the firm that owns property.ca and condos.ca (combined audience of over one million monthly registered Toronto-area users). Listings appear on both portals from day one and syndicate to MLS, Realtor.ca, Zumper, Kijiji, and nine other platforms.

## How the 21-day guarantee works

- **Standard fee:** One month's rent, payable on signed lease, if signed by day 21.
- **Discounted fee:** 79% of one month's rent if signed on day 22 or later (21% reduction, automatic).
- **No escalation:** No late-listing surcharge, no walk-away charge, no listing or photography fees.
- **Suspension clause:** The 21-day guarantee is suspended only if the owner lists more than 5% above FastLease's recommended price range, disclosed in writing before sign.

## Tenant screening (five layers)

1. Credit
2. Income-to-rent ratio
3. Employment verification
4. Two prior-landlord references contacted by phone
5. Document authentication

Applicants who clear only four of the five are not accepted. Every application is presented to the owner with the screening summary before signing.

## Service area

Toronto core neighborhoods covered with local pricing data:
King West, Liberty Village, CityPlace, St. Lawrence, Yonge & Eglinton, The Annex, Distillery, Fort York, Leslieville, plus the rest of the Greater Toronto Area priced against the closest comparable cluster.

## Operator

Sasha Bastani, Broker — Property.ca Inc. Brokerage.
